title: Resolution Extending Deepest Sympathy and Condolences to the Family, Relatives and Friends of Former Sangguniang Barangay Member of Barangay Batong Malake, Honorable Romeo Ocampo Roxas, Who Joined His Maker Last May 14, 2021. (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Janos S. Lapiz, Hon. Geronimo A. Ciceron, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Hon. Mike Dexter A. Concio, Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Hon. Rodora P. Loares, Hon. Arlene P. Delos Santos, Hon. Jozylyn N. Manansala, 05/17/2021)
